	Is_New varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS DEFAULT 'N' NULL,
	Is_Revised varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS DEFAULT 'N' NULL,
	Active_Status varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	User_String_1 varchar(40) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	User_String_2 varchar(40) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,

-- LISA_ONE.dbo.Activities definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE LISA_ONE.dbo.Activities;

CREATE TABLE Activities (
	Subscriber_ID int NOT NULL,
	ID int NOT NULL,
	AssignedTo varchar(50) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Subject varchar(50) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	DueDate datetime NULL,
	Priority varchar(2) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Status varchar(2) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	RelatedObject varchar(80) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	RelatedRecordID varchar(128) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Contact varchar(20) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Comment text COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	IsTask varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	[Type] varchar(40) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	RelatedDescription varchar(80) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Company varchar(20) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	LastChanged datetime NULL,
	LastChangedBy varchar(50) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	CreatedDate datetime NULL,
	CreatedBy varchar(50) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	IsNew varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	IsRevised varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	IsActive varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	CONSTRAINT PK_Activities PRIMARY KEY (Subscriber_ID,ID)
);
 CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX IX1_Activities ON LISA_ONE.dbo.Activities (  Subscriber_ID ASC  , AssignedTo ASC  , Status ASC  )  
	 WITH (  PAD_INDEX = OFF ,FILLFACTOR = 80   ,SORT_IN_TEMPDB = OFF , IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF , STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF , ONLINE = OFF , ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON , ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON  )
	 ON [PRIMARY ] ;
 CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX IX2_Activities ON LISA_ONE.dbo.Activities (  Subscriber_ID ASC  , RelatedObject ASC  , RelatedRecordID ASC  )  
	 WITH (  PAD_INDEX = OFF ,FILLFACTOR = 80   ,SORT_IN_TEMPDB = OFF , IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF , STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF , ONLINE = OFF , ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON , ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON  )
	 ON [PRIMARY ] ;

	Last_Payment_Amount money NULL,
	Last_Payment_Date datetime NULL,
	Last_Payment_No varchar(20) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Unapplied_Cash money NULL,
	Created_Date datetime NULL,
	Created_By varchar(12) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Is_New varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Is_Revised varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Active_Status varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Division_Id varchar(3) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NOT NULL,
	CONSTRAINT PK_ar_balance PRIMARY KEY (Customer_Id,Division_Id)
);
 CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX IX_AR_Balance_A ON LISA_ONE.dbo.AR_Balance (  Active_Status ASC  )  
	 WITH (  PAD_INDEX = OFF ,FILLFACTOR = 80   ,SORT_IN_TEMPDB = OFF , IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF , STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF , ONLINE = OFF , ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON , ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON  )
	 ON [PRIMARY ] ;

-- LISA_ONE.dbo.Availability definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE LISA_ONE.dbo.Availability;

CREATE TABLE Availability (
	Availability_Id int IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL,
	Facility_Id varchar(10) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Source_Type varchar(5) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Source_Id varchar(32) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Item_Id1 varchar(50) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Item_Id2 varchar(50) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Item_Type varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Available_Date datetime NULL,
	Source_Qty real NULL,
	Obligated_Qty real NULL,
	Available_Qty real NULL,
	Last_Changed datetime NULL,
	Last_Changed_By varchar(12) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Created_Date datetime NULL,
	Created_By varchar(12) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Is_New varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Is_Revised varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Active_Status varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Item varchar(101) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	CONSTRAINT PK_Availability PRIMARY KEY (Availability_Id)
);
 CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX IDX_AVAIL_A ON LISA_ONE.dbo.Availability (  Active_Status ASC  )  
	 WITH (  PAD_INDEX = OFF ,FILLFACTOR = 80   ,SORT_IN_TEMPDB = OFF , IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF , STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF , ONLINE = OFF , ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON , ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON  )
	 ON [PRIMARY ] ;
 CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX IDX_AVAIL_AID ON LISA_ONE.dbo.Availability (  Availability_Id ASC  )  
	 WITH (  PAD_INDEX = OFF ,FILLFACTOR = 80   ,SORT_IN_TEMPDB = OFF , IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF , STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF , ONLINE = OFF , ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON , ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON  )
	 ON [PRIMARY ] ;
 CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX IDX_AVAIL_A_ID1_ID2_SQ_OQ_AQ ON LISA_ONE.dbo.Availability (  Active_Status ASC  )  
	 INCLUDE ( Available_Qty , Item_Id1 , Item_Id2 , Obligated_Qty , Source_Qty ) 
	 WITH (  PAD_INDEX = OFF ,FILLFACTOR = 80   ,SORT_IN_TEMPDB = OFF , IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF , STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF , ONLINE = OFF , ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON , ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON  )
	 ON [PRIMARY ] ;

	 ON [PRIMARY ] ;

	 ON [PRIMARY ] ;

 CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX DailyAutomatedShipment_index ON LISA_ONE.dbo.BOL_Header (  Location ASC  )  
	 INCLUDE ( BOL_Id , Customer_Order , Order_Id , Ready_Date , Sched_Date , Ship_Date , Shipmode , Shipto_City , Shipto_State , Total_Conv_Meas ) 
	 WITH (  PAD_INDEX = OFF ,FILLFACTOR = 100  ,SORT_IN_TEMPDB = OFF , IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF , STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF , ONLINE = OFF , ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON , ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON  )
	 ON [PRIMARY ] ;
 CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX IX_BOL_Header_Facility_Location_Status ON LISA_ONE.dbo.BOL_Header (  Status ASC  , Facility_Id ASC  , Location ASC  )  
	 WITH (  PAD_INDEX = OFF ,FILLFACTOR = 80   ,SORT_IN_TEMPDB = OFF , IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF , STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF , ONLINE = OFF , ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON , ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON  )
	 ON [PRIMARY ] ;

	 ON [PRIMARY ] ;

	 ON [PRIMARY ] ;

 CREATE UNIQUE NONCLUSTERED INDEX UK_Company_Tax_Exemption ON LISA_ONE.dbo.Company_Tax_Exemption (  Company_Id ASC  , State_Id ASC  )  
	 WITH (  PAD_INDEX = OFF ,FILLFACTOR = 80   ,SORT_IN_TEMPDB = OFF , IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF , STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF , ONLINE = OFF , ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON , ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON  )
	 ON [PRIMARY ] ;

	Created_By varchar(12) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Is_New varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS DEFAULT 'N' NULL,
	Is_Revised varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS DEFAULT 'N' NULL,
	Active_Status varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	User_String_1 varchar(40) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	User_String_2 varchar(40) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	User_String_3 varchar(40) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	User_String_4 varchar(40) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	User_String_5 varchar(40) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	User_Numeric_1 real DEFAULT 0 NULL,
	User_Numeric_2 real DEFAULT 0 NULL,
	User_Date_1 datetime NULL,
	User_Date_2 datetime NULL,

	Ship_To_Country varchar(10) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,

	Customer_Class varchar(10) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Last_Changed datetime NULL,
	Last_Changed_By varchar(12) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Created_Date datetime NULL,
	Created_By varchar(12) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Is_New varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS DEFAULT 'N' NULL,
	Is_Revised varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS DEFAULT 'N' NULL,
	Active_Status varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,

-- LISA_ONE.dbo.Customer_Sku definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE LISA_ONE.dbo.Customer_Sku;

CREATE TABLE Customer_Sku (
	Seq int IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL,
	Cust_Id varchar(15) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Product_Id varchar(32) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Base_Product_Id varchar(32) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Attribute_Group_Id varchar(10) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Cust_Product_No varchar(40) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Comment1 varchar(255) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Last_Changed datetime NULL,
	Last_Changed_By varchar(12) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Max_Falldown real DEFAULT 0 NULL,
	Falldown_Discount real DEFAULT 0 NULL,
	Price money DEFAULT 0 NULL,
	Created_Date datetime NULL,
	Created_By varchar(12) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Is_New varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS DEFAULT 'N' NULL,
	Is_Revised varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS DEFAULT 'N' NULL,
	Active_Status varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	User_String_1 varchar(40) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	User_String_2 varchar(40) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	User_String_3 varchar(40) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	User_String_4 varchar(40) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	User_String_5 varchar(40) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	User_Numeric_1 real DEFAULT 0 NULL,
	User_Numeric_2 real DEFAULT 0 NULL,
	User_Date_1 datetime NULL,
	User_Date_2 datetime NULL,
	Product_Descrip varchar(40) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Charge_Code varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	MOH_Code varchar(2) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Special_Service varchar(10) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Allowance_Charge varchar(10) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	MOS_Code varchar(36) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	EDI_Table varchar(20) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Total_Amt_Value varchar(30) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Trading_Customer_Id varchar(32) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Id_type varchar(30) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Barcode char(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Default_Sku varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Order_Sequence_Number int DEFAULT '0' NOT NULL,
	CONSTRAINT PK_customer_sku PRIMARY KEY (Seq)
);
 CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX IX_Base_Product_Id_Attribute_Group_Id_Active_Status ON LISA_ONE.dbo.Customer_Sku (  Base_Product_Id ASC  , Attribute_Group_Id ASC  , Active_Status ASC  )  
	 WITH (  PAD_INDEX = OFF ,FILLFACTOR = 100  ,SORT_IN_TEMPDB = OFF , IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF , STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF , ONLINE = OFF , ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON , ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON  )
	 ON [PRIMARY ] ;
 CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX IX_CustomerSku_ProductId_AttributeGroupId_IdType ON LISA_ONE.dbo.Customer_Sku (  Product_Id ASC  , Attribute_Group_Id ASC  , Id_type ASC  )  
	 INCLUDE ( Cust_Id , Cust_Product_No , Product_Descrip ) 
	 WITH (  PAD_INDEX = OFF ,FILLFACTOR = 100  ,SORT_IN_TEMPDB = OFF , IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF , STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF , ONLINE = OFF , ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON , ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON  )
	 ON [PRIMARY ] ;
 CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX IX_customer_sku_1 ON LISA_ONE.dbo.Customer_Sku (  Cust_Id ASC  )  
	 WITH (  PAD_INDEX = OFF ,FILLFACTOR = 80   ,SORT_IN_TEMPDB = OFF , IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF , STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF , ONLINE = OFF , ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON , ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON  )
	 ON [PRIMARY ] ;

	Line_No int NULL,

-- LISA_ONE.dbo.Dw_Control definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE LISA_ONE.dbo.Dw_Control;

CREATE TABLE Dw_Control (
	row_id bigint IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL,
	key_value varchar(15) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	table_name varchar(50) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	proc_ind bit DEFAULT 0 NULL,
	insert_ts smalldatetime DEFAULT getdate() NULL
);
 CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX IX_Dw_Control_Key_Value ON LISA_ONE.dbo.Dw_Control (  key_value ASC  , table_name ASC  )  
	 INCLUDE ( insert_ts , proc_ind ) 
	 WITH (  PAD_INDEX = OFF ,FILLFACTOR = 100  ,SORT_IN_TEMPDB = OFF , IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF , STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF , ONLINE = OFF , ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON , ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON  )
	 ON [PRIMARY ] ;
 CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX IX_Dw_Control_Table_Date ON LISA_ONE.dbo.Dw_Control (  table_name ASC  , insert_ts ASC  )  
	 INCLUDE ( key_value , proc_ind ) 
	 WITH (  PAD_INDEX = OFF ,FILLFACTOR = 100  ,SORT_IN_TEMPDB = OFF , IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF , STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF , ONLINE = OFF , ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON , ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON  )
	 ON [PRIMARY ] ;
 CREATE UNIQUE NONCLUSTERED INDEX PK_DW_CONTROL ON LISA_ONE.dbo.Dw_Control (  row_id ASC  )  
	 WITH (  PAD_INDEX = OFF ,FILLFACTOR = 80   ,SORT_IN_TEMPDB = OFF , IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF , STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF , ONLINE = OFF , ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON , ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON  )
	 ON [PRIMARY ] ;


-- LISA_ONE.dbo.ErrorLog definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE LISA_ONE.dbo.ErrorLog;

CREATE TABLE ErrorLog (
	Subscriber_ID int NOT NULL,
	Seq int IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL,
	User_ID varchar(50) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	ErrorDate datetime NULL,
	ReferenceNo varchar(20) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,

	LastChanged datetime NULL,
	LastChangedBy varchar(50) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	CreatedDate datetime NULL,
	CreatedBy varchar(50) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	IsNew varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	IsRevised varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	IsActive varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	CONSTRAINT PK_ErrorLog PRIMARY KEY (Subscriber_ID,Seq)
);

-- DROP TABLE LISA_ONE.dbo.FIFO_History;

CREATE TABLE FIFO_History (
	seq int IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL,
	Fiscal_Year int NULL,
	Fiscal_Month int NULL,
	Facility_id varchar(10) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Location varchar(10) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Source_Product varchar(32) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Sort_Code int NULL,
	Sales_Product_Id varchar(32) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Product_id varchar(32) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Attribute_Group_Id varchar(10) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Descrip varchar(80) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	POId varchar(15) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	GPPO char(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Class varchar(20) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Family varchar(20) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Receipt_Qty int NULL,
	Receipt_Footage int NULL,
	Receipt_Price real NULL,
	Receipt_Cost real NULL,
	Qty_On_Hand int NULL,
	Calculation_Qty int NULL,
	Calculation_Balance int NULL,
	Inventory_Value real NULL,
	Adder real NULL,
	Adder_Value real NULL,
	Receipt_RecDate datetime NULL,
	UOM varchar(5) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Receipt_FY int NULL,
	Receipt_FM int NULL,
	Charge_Code varchar(2) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	PO_Shortage_To_Fulfill_Inventory char(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Average_Cost char(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	r_Product_id varchar(32) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	r_attribute_group_id varchar(10) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Document_Type char(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS DEFAULT '' NULL,
	Mapped_Facility_FIFO_Period int NULL,
	Created_Date datetime NULL,
	CONSTRAINT PK__FIFO_History__541073B3 PRIMARY KEY (seq)
);
 CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX ix_FIFO_FLPA ON LISA_ONE.dbo.FIFO_History (  Facility_id ASC  , Location ASC  , Product_id ASC  , Attribute_Group_Id ASC  )  
	 WITH (  PAD_INDEX = OFF ,FILLFACTOR = 80   ,SORT_IN_TEMPDB = OFF , IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF , STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF , ONLINE = OFF , ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON , ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON  )
	 ON [PRIMARY ] ;

	Location_Id varchar(10) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Ship_Mode varchar(10) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,

	Car_Type varchar(10) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Route_Code varchar(80) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Authority_Code varchar(20) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Flat_Rate money NULL,
	Base_Rate money NULL,
	Excess_Rate money NULL,
	Last_Rated_Date datetime NULL,
	Last_Changed datetime NULL,
	Last_Changed_By varchar(12) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Last_Rating_Status varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Rate_Id int NOT NULL,
	Mileage real NULL,

CREATE TABLE Future_Production_Run (
	Run_Id int IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL,
	Facility_Id varchar(10) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Run_Date datetime NULL,
	Available_Date datetime NULL,
	Product_Id varchar(32) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Attribute_Group_Id varchar(10) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	UOM varchar(10) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Planned_Qty real NULL,
	Original_Qty real NULL,
	Remaining_Qty real NULL,
	Last_Changed datetime NULL,
	Last_Changed_By varchar(12) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Created_Date datetime NULL,
	Created_By varchar(12) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Is_New varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Is_Revised varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Active_Status varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	IsUpdatedByFPRInput bit NULL,
	Sequence_Number int NULL,
	CONSTRAINT PK_Future_Production_Run PRIMARY KEY (Run_Id)
);
 CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX IX_FPR_FacId_ProdId_AttrId_RundDt ON LISA_ONE.dbo.Future_Production_Run (  Facility_Id ASC  , Product_Id ASC  , Attribute_Group_Id ASC  , Run_Date ASC  )  
	 INCLUDE ( Active_Status , Remaining_Qty ) 
	 WITH (  PAD_INDEX = OFF ,FILLFACTOR = 100  ,SORT_IN_TEMPDB = OFF , IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF , STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF , ONLINE = OFF , ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON , ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON  )
	 ON [PRIMARY ] ;

	 INCLUDE ( Active_Status , Attribute_Group_Id , Product_Id , Remaining_Qty ) 
	 WITH (  PAD_INDEX = OFF ,FILLFACTOR = 100  ,SORT_IN_TEMPDB = OFF , IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF , STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF , ONLINE = OFF , ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON , ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON  )
	 ON [PRIMARY ] ;

	 WITH (  PAD_INDEX = OFF ,FILLFACTOR = 80   ,SORT_IN_TEMPDB = OFF , IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF , STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF , ONLINE = OFF , ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON , ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON  )

	Is_Revised varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,

	 ON [PRIMARY ] ;

	Seq int IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL,
	Facility_Id varchar(10) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NOT NULL,
	Location varchar(10) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Product_Id varchar(32) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Attribute_Group_Id varchar(10) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Document_Id varchar(15) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Document_Type varchar(10) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Document_Reversal_Id varchar(15) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Transaction_Date datetime NULL,
	Cost_Date datetime NULL,
	Tag_Id varchar(20) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Qty real NULL,
	Footage decimal(18,3) NULL,
	Pcs_Pkg real NULL,
	Balance real NULL,
	Amount money NULL,
	Fiscal_Year int NULL,
	Fiscal_Month int NULL,
	Last_Changed datetime NULL,
	Last_Changed_By varchar(12) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Created_Date datetime NULL,
	Created_By varchar(12) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Is_New varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Is_Revised varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Active_Status varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Freight smallmoney NULL,
	CONSTRAINT PK_InventoryTransactionLog PRIMARY KEY (Seq)
);

	Seq int IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL,
	Invoice_Id varchar(15) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Product_Id varchar(32) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,

	Base_Qty real DEFAULT 0 NULL,
	Pkgsize real DEFAULT 0 NULL,
	Price money DEFAULT 0 NULL,
	Price_Unit varchar(6) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Base_Price money DEFAULT 0 NULL,
	Amount money DEFAULT 0 NULL,
	Discount_Perc real DEFAULT 0 NULL,
	Freight real DEFAULT 0 NULL,
	[Generated] varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS DEFAULT '0' NULL,
	Include varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS DEFAULT '0' NULL,
	Tally varchar(200) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	[Type] varchar(5) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Location varchar(10) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Supplier varchar(10) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Po_Num varchar(15) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Freight_Amount money DEFAULT 0 NULL,
	Weight real DEFAULT 0 NULL,
	Cost_Amount money DEFAULT 0 NULL,
	Cost_Freight money DEFAULT 0 NULL,
	Cost_Tag money DEFAULT 0 NULL,
	BOL_Id varchar(15) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	BOL_Special varchar(5) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Line_Source varchar(3) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,

CREATE TABLE Invoice_Validation (
	Product_Group varchar(12) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Currency_Code varchar(10) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Seq int IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL,
	Last_Changed datetime NULL,
	Last_Changed_By varchar(12) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Created_Date datetime NULL,
	Created_By varchar(12) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Is_New varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS DEFAULT 'N' NULL,
	Is_Revised varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS DEFAULT 'N' NULL,
	Active_Status varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	User_String_1 varchar(40) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	User_String_2 varchar(40) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	User_String_3 varchar(40) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	User_String_4 varchar(40) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	User_String_5 varchar(40) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	User_Numeric_1 real DEFAULT 0 NULL,
	User_Numeric_2 real DEFAULT 0 NULL,
	User_Date_1 datetime NULL,
	User_Date_2 datetime NULL,
	Max_Quantity real DEFAULT 0 NULL,
	Min_Price money DEFAULT 0 NULL,
	Max_Price money DEFAULT 0 NULL,
	Product_Type varchar(10) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Price_UOM varchar(10) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	CONSTRAINT PK_Invoice_Validation PRIMARY KEY (Seq)
);
 CREATE UNIQUE NONCLUSTERED INDEX UK_Invoice_Validation ON LISA_ONE.dbo.Invoice_Validation (  Product_Type ASC  , Product_Group ASC  , Currency_Code ASC  , Price_UOM ASC  )  
	 WITH (  PAD_INDEX = OFF ,FILLFACTOR = 80   ,SORT_IN_TEMPDB = OFF , IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF , STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF , ONLINE = OFF , ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON , ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON  )
	 ON [PRIMARY ] ;

	 WITH (  PAD_INDEX = OFF ,FILLFACTOR = 80   ,SORT_IN_TEMPDB = OFF , IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF , STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF , ONLINE = OFF , ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON , ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON  )
	 ON [PRIMARY ] ;

	 WITH (  PAD_INDEX = OFF ,FILLFACTOR = 80   ,SORT_IN_TEMPDB = OFF , IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF , STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF , ONLINE = OFF , ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON , ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON  )
	 ON [PRIMARY ] ;

-- LISA_ONE.dbo.Order_Conversion definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE LISA_ONE.dbo.Order_Conversion;

CREATE TABLE Order_Conversion (
	Order_Id varchar(15) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NOT NULL,
	Active_Status varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	CONSTRAINT PK_Order_Conversion PRIMARY KEY (Order_Id)
);

	Cost money NULL,

	Last_Changed datetime NULL,

	Created_Date datetime NULL,
	Created_By varchar(12) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Is_New varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS DEFAULT 'N' NULL,
	Is_Revised varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS DEFAULT 'N' NULL,
	Active_Status varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Hidden_Cost varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS DEFAULT 'N' NULL,
	CONSTRAINT PK_Order_Detail_Attributes PRIMARY KEY (Attrib_Id,Order_Id,Line_No)
);

	 ON [PRIMARY ] ;

	Bank_Address3 varchar(50) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,

	Load_Port_Name varchar(60) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Load_Port_Address_1 varchar(50) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Load_Port_Address_2 varchar(50) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,

	Consignee_Address_1 varchar(50) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Consignee_Address_2 varchar(50) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,

CREATE TABLE Order_Next_Num (
	Order_No int NOT NULL,
	Facility_Id varchar(10) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NOT NULL,
	Last_Changed datetime NULL,
	Last_Changed_By varchar(12) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Created_Date datetime NULL,
	Created_By varchar(12) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Is_New varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Is_Revised varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Active_Status varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	CONSTRAINT PK_Order_Next_Num PRIMARY KEY (Order_No,Facility_Id)
);


-- LISA_ONE.dbo.Order_Obligations definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE LISA_ONE.dbo.Order_Obligations;

CREATE TABLE Order_Obligations (
	Order_Id varchar(15) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NOT NULL,
	Facility_Id varchar(10) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NOT NULL,
	Product_Id varchar(32) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NOT NULL,
	Attribute_Group_Id varchar(10) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NOT NULL,
	Availability_Id int NOT NULL,
	Qty real NULL,
	Schedule_Date datetime NULL,
	Floor_Stock_Only varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Contract_Id varchar(50) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Contract_Item_Type varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Contract_Item_Id1 varchar(32) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,

 CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX IDX_ORDER_TEMPLATE_DETAIL_A ON LISA_ONE.dbo.Order_Template_Detail (  Active_Status ASC  )  
	 INCLUDE ( Attribute_Group_Id , Descrip , Local_Product_Id , Order_Id , Product_Id ) 
	 WITH (  PAD_INDEX = OFF ,FILLFACTOR = 100  ,SORT_IN_TEMPDB = OFF , IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF , STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF , ONLINE = OFF , ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON , ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON  )
	 ON [PRIMARY ] ;
 CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX IDX_ORDER_TEMPLATE_DETAIL_PID_AGID ON LISA_ONE.dbo.Order_Template_Detail (  Product_Id ASC  , Attribute_Group_Id ASC  )  
	 INCLUDE ( Base_Price , Footage , Pkgs , Qty , Weight ) 
	 WITH (  PAD_INDEX = OFF ,FILLFACTOR = 100  ,SORT_IN_TEMPDB = OFF , IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF , STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF , ONLINE = OFF , ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON , ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON  )
	 ON [PRIMARY ] ;
 CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX IX_order_template_detail ON LISA_ONE.dbo.Order_Template_Detail (  Order_Id ASC  )  
	 WITH (  PAD_INDEX = OFF ,FILLFACTOR = 80   ,SORT_IN_TEMPDB = OFF , IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF , STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF , ONLINE = OFF , ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON , ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON  )
	 ON [PRIMARY ] ;

);
 CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX IDX_ORDER_TEMPLATE_DETAIL_MQID ON LISA_ONE.dbo.Order_Template_Header (  Master_Quote_Id ASC  )  
	 INCLUDE ( Order_Id ) 
	 WITH (  PAD_INDEX = OFF ,FILLFACTOR = 80   ,SORT_IN_TEMPDB = OFF , IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF , STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF , ONLINE = OFF , ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON , ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON  )
	 ON [PRIMARY ] ;
 CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX IX_OTH ON LISA_ONE.dbo.Order_Template_Header (  Order_Id ASC  )  
	 INCLUDE ( User_Data10 , User_Data8 ) 
	 WITH (  PAD_INDEX = OFF ,FILLFACTOR = 80   ,SORT_IN_TEMPDB = OFF , IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF , STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF , ONLINE = OFF , ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON , ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON  )
	 ON [PRIMARY ] ;

	Created_Date datetime NULL,

	Is_New char(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Is_Revised char(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Active_Status char(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	CONSTRAINT PK_NAICS_Codes_Product_Association PRIMARY KEY (ID),

);

	Descrip varchar(100) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,

	Last_Changed datetime NULL,
	Last_Changed_By varchar(12) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Created_Date datetime NULL,
	Created_By varchar(12) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Is_New varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS DEFAULT 'N' NULL,
	Is_Revised varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS DEFAULT 'N' NULL,
	Active_Status varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	User_String_1 varchar(40) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	User_String_2 varchar(40) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	User_String_3 varchar(40) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	User_String_4 varchar(40) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	User_String_5 varchar(40) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	User_Numeric_1 real DEFAULT 0 NULL,
	User_Numeric_2 real DEFAULT 0 NULL,
	User_Date_1 datetime NULL,
	User_Date_2 datetime NULL,

	Is_Zone_Pricing varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS DEFAULT 'N' NULL,
	Comments varchar(512) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,

	Contract_Type varchar(10) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,

	Disc_Calc_Method char(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,

CREATE TABLE Price_List_Prices (
	Price_List_id varchar(10) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NOT NULL,
	Seq int IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL,
	LineItem_Type varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	LineItem_Id varchar(32) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Zone_Id varchar(10) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Effective_Date datetime NULL,
	Expiry_Date datetime NULL,
	Date_Type varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	TL_Price money NULL,
	TL_Discount real NULL,
	TL_Rate real NULL,
	LTL_Price money NULL,
	LTL_Discount real NULL,
	LTL_Rate real NULL,
	Non_Inv_Product_Id varchar(32) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Ship_From_Facility varchar(10) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Price_Mod_Id varchar(10) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Active_Status varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Last_Changed datetime NULL,
	Last_Changed_By varchar(12) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Created_Date datetime NULL,
	Created_By varchar(12) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Is_New varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS DEFAULT 'N' NULL,
	Is_Revised varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS DEFAULT 'N' NULL,
	Price_Audit varchar(500) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	LineItem_Descrip varchar(80) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Ignore_Zero_Price char(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	CONSTRAINT PK_Price_List_Prices PRIMARY KEY (Seq)
);

	 ON [PRIMARY ] ;

	 ON [PRIMARY ] ;

	 WITH (  PAD_INDEX = OFF ,FILLFACTOR = 100  ,SORT_IN_TEMPDB = OFF , IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF , STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF , ONLINE = OFF , ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON , ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON  )

	TL_Discount real NULL,
	TL_Rate real NULL,
	LTL_Price money NULL,
	LTL_Discount real NULL,
	LTL_Rate real NULL,
	Non_Inv_Product_Id varchar(32) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Ship_From_Facility varchar(10) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Price_Mod_Id varchar(10) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Active_Status varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Last_Changed datetime NULL,
	Last_Changed_By varchar(12) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Created_Date datetime NULL,
	Created_By varchar(12) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Is_New varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Is_Revised varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Price_Audit varchar(500) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,

	Ignore_Zero_Price char(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL
);

-- LISA_ONE.dbo.Reason_Code definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE LISA_ONE.dbo.Reason_Code;

CREATE TABLE Reason_Code (
	Reason_Type varchar(10) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Reason_Code varchar(10) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Descrip varchar(50) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Seq int IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL,
	Last_Changed datetime NULL,
	Last_Changed_By varchar(12) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Created_Date datetime NULL,
	Created_By varchar(12) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Is_New varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS DEFAULT 'N' NULL,
	Is_Revised varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS DEFAULT 'N' NULL,
	Active_Status varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	User_String_1 varchar(40) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	User_String_2 varchar(40) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	User_String_3 varchar(40) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	User_String_4 varchar(40) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	User_String_5 varchar(40) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	User_Numeric_1 real DEFAULT 0 NULL,
	User_Numeric_2 real DEFAULT 0 NULL,
	User_Date_1 datetime NULL,
	User_Date_2 datetime NULL,
	CONSTRAINT PK_Reason_code PRIMARY KEY (Seq)
);
 CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX IX_Reason_Code_Reason ON LISA_ONE.dbo.Reason_Code (  Reason_Code ASC  )  
	 WITH (  PAD_INDEX = OFF ,FILLFACTOR = 80   ,SORT_IN_TEMPDB = OFF , IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF , STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF , ONLINE = OFF , ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON , ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON  )
	 ON [PRIMARY ] ;
 CREATE UNIQUE NONCLUSTERED INDEX UK_Reason_code ON LISA_ONE.dbo.Reason_Code (  Reason_Type ASC  , Reason_Code ASC  )  
	 WITH (  PAD_INDEX = OFF ,FILLFACTOR = 80   ,SORT_IN_TEMPDB = OFF , IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF , STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF , ONLINE = OFF , ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON , ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON  )
	 ON [PRIMARY ] ;

	Subscriber_ID int NOT NULL,
	Object_ID varchar(80) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NOT NULL,

	LastChanged datetime NULL,
	LastChangedBy varchar(50) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	CreatedBy varchar(50) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	CreatedDate datetime NULL,
	IsNew varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	IsRevised varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	IsActive varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	CONSTRAINT PK_RecordTemplates PRIMARY KEY (Subscriber_ID,Object_ID,ID,User_ID)
);

	Dest_Carrier varchar(10) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Delivered_Total_38 money NULL,
	Shipmode varchar(10) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	CONSTRAINT PK__Sales_Quote_Pric__26D3B8E8 PRIMARY KEY (Seq)

-- LISA_ONE.dbo.STS_TREND_DATA definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE LISA_ONE.dbo.STS_TREND_DATA;

CREATE TABLE STS_TREND_DATA (
	OrderDate datetime NULL,
	Facility_Id varchar(10) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Product_Id varchar(20) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	MBF real NULL,
	AveragePrice decimal(18,2) NULL,
	Price_EMA9 decimal(18,2) NULL,
	Price_EMA12 decimal(18,2) NULL,
	Price_EMA26 decimal(18,2) NULL,
	Price_MACD decimal(18,2) NULL,
	Volume_EMA9 decimal(18,2) NULL,
	Volume_EMA12 decimal(18,2) NULL,
	Volume_EMA26 decimal(18,2) NULL,
	Volume_MACD decimal(18,2) NULL,
	Price_Signal decimal(18,2) NULL,
	Volume_Signal decimal(18,2) NULL,
	MIN_P_SIGNAL decimal(18,2) NULL,
	MAX_P_SIGNAL decimal(18,2) NULL,
	MIN_V_SIGNAL decimal(18,2) NULL,
	MAX_V_SIGNAL decimal(18,2) NULL,
	MIN_P_SIGNAL_ALL decimal(18,2) NULL,
	MAX_P_SIGNAL_ALL decimal(18,2) NULL,
	MIN_V_SIGNAL_ALL decimal(18,2) NULL,
	MAX_V_SIGNAL_ALL decimal(18,2) NULL
);
 CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX IX_STS_TREND_1 ON LISA_ONE.dbo.STS_TREND_DATA (  Facility_Id ASC  , Product_Id ASC  )  
	 WITH (  PAD_INDEX = OFF ,FILLFACTOR = 80   ,SORT_IN_TEMPDB = OFF , IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF , STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF , ONLINE = OFF , ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON , ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON  )
	 ON [PRIMARY ] ;
 CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX IX_STS_TREND_DATA_FACID_ODT ON LISA_ONE.dbo.STS_TREND_DATA (  Facility_Id ASC  , OrderDate ASC  )  
	 INCLUDE ( AveragePrice , MAX_P_SIGNAL , MAX_P_SIGNAL_ALL , MAX_V_SIGNAL , MAX_V_SIGNAL_ALL , MBF , MIN_P_SIGNAL , MIN_P_SIGNAL_ALL , MIN_V_SIGNAL , MIN_V_SIGNAL_ALL , Price_EMA12 , Price_EMA26 , Price_EMA9 , Price_MACD , Price_Signal , Product_Id , Volume_EMA12 , Volume_EMA26 , Volume_EMA9 , Volume_MACD , Volume_Signal ) 
	 WITH (  PAD_INDEX = OFF ,FILLFACTOR = 80   ,SORT_IN_TEMPDB = OFF , IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF , STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF , ONLINE = OFF , ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON , ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON  )
	 ON [PRIMARY ] ;

	Tot_Lin real NULL,
	Tot_Sf real NULL,

	Created_By varchar(12) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Created_Date datetime NULL,
	Is_New varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Is_Revised varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Active_Status varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Created_Source varchar(15) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,

	rec_from_facility_id varchar(10) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	shift_id varchar(10) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,

	Tag_Created_By varchar(12) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,

	Attribute_Group_Id varchar(10) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Multi_Pack varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS DEFAULT 'N' NULL,
	Product_Type varchar(3) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Tot_ConvFtg real NULL,
	Reversal_id varchar(15) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Process_Date datetime NULL,
	Qty varchar(4) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	MPFlag varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Consumed_Date datetime NULL,
	Consumed_By varchar(20) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Consumed_Crew_ID varchar(10) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Consumed_Shift_ID varchar(10) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Yard_Location varchar(12) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Consumed_Machine_Center_Id varchar(12) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Consumed_Machine_Center_Station_Id varchar(12) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	ReprintWarningAccepted int NULL,
	Offgrade_Reason_Category_Id varchar(50) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Offgrade_Reason_SubCategory_Id varchar(50) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Hold_Date date NULL,
	Tag_Release_Date datetime NULL,
	Hold_Type varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,

	Moisture_Content real NULL,
	Moisture_Standard_Deviation real NULL,
	Stack_Level int NULL,
	Moisture_TimeStamp datetime NULL,
	Kiln_TimeStamp datetime NULL,
	CONSTRAINT PK_tag_header PRIMARY KEY (Tag_Id)
);
 CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX IDX_Tag_Header_FLPA ON LISA_ONE.dbo.Tag_Header (  Facility_Id ASC  , Location ASC  , Product_Id ASC  , Attribute_Group_Id ASC  , Status ASC  )  
	 WITH (  PAD_INDEX = OFF ,FILLFACTOR = 80   ,SORT_IN_TEMPDB = OFF , IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF , STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF , ONLINE = OFF , ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON , ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON  )
	 ON [PRIMARY ] ;
 CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX IDX_Tag_Header_Facility_CreateDate ON LISA_ONE.dbo.Tag_Header (  Created_Date ASC  )  
	 INCLUDE ( Facility_Id , Tot_Qty ) 
	 WITH (  PAD_INDEX = OFF ,FILLFACTOR = 80   ,SORT_IN_TEMPDB = OFF , IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF , STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF , ONLINE = OFF , ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON , ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON  )
	 ON [PRIMARY ] ;
 CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX IDX_Tag_Header_Product ON LISA_ONE.dbo.Tag_Header (  Product_Id ASC  , Attribute_Group_Id ASC  )  
	 WITH (  PAD_INDEX = OFF ,FILLFACTOR = 80   ,SORT_IN_TEMPDB = OFF , IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF , STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF , ONLINE = OFF , ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON , ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON  )
	 ON [PRIMARY ] ;
 CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX IDX_Tag_Header_Status ON LISA_ONE.dbo.Tag_Header (  Status ASC  )  
	 WITH (  PAD_INDEX = OFF ,FILLFACTOR = 80   ,SORT_IN_TEMPDB = OFF , IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF , STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF , ONLINE = OFF , ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON , ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON  )

	 ON [PRIMARY ] ;

	 ON [PRIMARY ] ;

	 WITH (  PAD_INDEX = OFF ,FILLFACTOR = 80   ,SORT_IN_TEMPDB = OFF , IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF , STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF , ONLINE = OFF , ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON , ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON  )
	 ON [PRIMARY ] ;

-- LISA_ONE.dbo.Territory definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE LISA_ONE.dbo.Territory;

CREATE TABLE Territory (
	Territory_Id varchar(10) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NOT NULL,
	Group_Id varchar(10) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,

	EmailAddress varchar(60) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,

	IsRevised varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	PasswordRequestId varchar(10) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	PasswordLastChanged datetime NULL,
	PasswordNeverExpires varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	InvalidLoginCount int NULL,
	UserAlias varchar(10) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,

	Company varchar(40) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Department varchar(20) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,

	MailingAddress2 varchar(50) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	MailingCity varchar(20) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	MailingState varchar(10) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	MailingCountry varchar(20) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,

	EndOfDay datetime NULL,

	Template varchar(50) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,

	Routing_Info_2 varchar(80) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,

	Recipient_Type varchar(50) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,

	RW_Parameters varchar(800) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Active_Status varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	CONSTRAINT PK_xml_message PRIMARY KEY (Seq)
);
 CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX IX_XML_Message_1 ON LISA_ONE.dbo.XML_Message (  Message_Type ASC  , Created_Date ASC  )  
	 WITH (  PAD_INDEX = OFF ,FILLFACTOR = 80   ,SORT_IN_TEMPDB = OFF , IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF , STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF , ONLINE = OFF , ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON , ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON  )
	 ON [PRIMARY ] ;
 CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX IX_xml_message ON LISA_ONE.dbo.XML_Message (  Status ASC  , Last_Changed ASC  )  
	 WITH (  PAD_INDEX = OFF ,FILLFACTOR = 80   ,SORT_IN_TEMPDB = OFF , IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF , STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF , ONLINE = OFF , ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON , ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON  )
	 ON [PRIMARY ] ;

	Yard_Id varchar(12) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NOT NULL,
	Descrip varchar(40) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Facility_Id varchar(10) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NOT NULL,
	Last_Changed datetime NULL,
	Last_Changed_By varchar(12) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Seq int IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL,
	Created_Date datetime NULL,
	Created_By varchar(12) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Is_New varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS DEFAULT 'N' NULL,
	Is_Revised varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS DEFAULT 'N' NULL,
	Active_Status varchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	User_String_1 varchar(40) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	User_String_2 varchar(40) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	User_String_3 varchar(40) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	User_String_4 varchar(40) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	User_String_5 varchar(40) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	User_Numeric_1 real DEFAULT 0 NULL,
	User_Numeric_2 real DEFAULT 0 NULL,
	User_Date_1 datetime NULL,
	User_Date_2 datetime NULL,
	CONSTRAINT PK_yard_location PRIMARY KEY (Seq)
);
 CREATE UNIQUE NONCLUSTERED INDEX IX_yard_location ON LISA_ONE.dbo.Yard_Location (  Facility_Id ASC  , Yard_Id ASC  )  
	 WITH (  PAD_INDEX = OFF ,FILLFACTOR = 80   ,SORT_IN_TEMPDB = OFF , IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF , STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF , ONLINE = OFF , ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON , ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON  )
	 ON [PRIMARY ] ;

CREATE TABLE TMS_Error_Email_Prefs (
	User_Id varchar(40) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NOT NULL,
	Email_Address varchar(60) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Receive_Emails nchar(1) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NULL,
	Facility_Id nvarchar(10) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS NOT NULL,
	CONSTRAINT PK_TMS_Error_Email_Prefs PRIMARY KEY (Facility_Id,User_Id),
	CONSTRAINT FK_TMS_Error_Email_Prefs_User_Security FOREIGN KEY (User_Id) REFERENCES Security_Users(User_Id)
);

	SP_Converted_Mill_Id int IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL,

	Created_Date datetime NOT NULL,

);


-- LISA_ONE.dbo.SP_Converted_Mill foreign keys
